qmc_sampling.description: Quasi-Monte Carlo sampling using golden ratio conjugate for low-discrepancy k-space coverage

k_parameter.description: Resonance parameter range for factor prediction

mode_scanning.description: Scan ±180 modes around central mode m0 for each k value

dirichlet_kernel.description: Dirichlet kernel order and threshold for resonance detection: |D_J(θ)| ≥ 0.92 × (2J+1)

bias_correction.description: No phase bias correction applied (pure geometric)

verification.description: Method uses only geometric resonance - no classical factoring operations
